description: Cut a dash with these shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish leather jacket. Upper High quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Reinforced overlay for the heel Central lacing system Stitched detailing on the midfoot and the heel for style Padded sockliner for instep comfort Midsole Rubber midsole for comfort Outsole Diamond patterned TPR outsole with a raised heel shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
